title: Constituencies collection (per state, per body)
description: Electoral constituencies within a single state for a single legislative body (Assembly or Parliament). Keyed by ECI's numeric constituency number, which is stable within (state, body).

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Per-(state, body) constituency list with ECI number, name, district reference, reservation.
Replaced optional source_url with required source field (top-level) and optional source override on items per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12).
Replaced single source string with sources array of {url, fetched_at} per ADR-0002. Empty array means hand-authored. Item-level source overrides removed.

Added hierarchy fields per ADR-0015: district_id and pc_id are mandatory on AC items (file is conditionally required to declare them when status=complete). Added optional electors and established_year. Added file-level status enum (provisional|complete) gating completeness rules. pc_id is forbidden on PC items.

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

body.description: AC = Legislative Assembly Constituency. PC = Parliamentary Constituency (Lok Sabha).

status.description: Lifecycle state (see docs/architecture/data-model.md#constituency-hierarchy-and-status-lifecycle). 'provisional' = bootstrapped from a single (typically Wikipedia) source; hierarchy fields may be absent. 'complete' = cross-checked against an authoritative ECI source (Delimitation Order or results portal); for body=AC, district_id and pc_id MUST be present on every item.

eci_no.description: ECI's constituency number within (state, body). Stable across elections unless redrawn.

district_id.description: Stable district id (LGD code or Wikipedia slug) from the same state's districts file. Hierarchical: every AC sits in exactly one district. PCs span multiple districts and SHOULD omit this field.

pc_id.description: Composite id of the Lok Sabha (Parliamentary) constituency this AC falls within, of the form '<state>-PC-<eci_no>' (e.g. 'S22-PC-2'). Hierarchical: every AC belongs to exactly one PC per the Delimitation Order. Forbidden on PC items (a PC does not nest inside another PC).

electors.description: Snapshot count of registered electors from the most recent electoral roll known when this file was emitted. Optional; turnout/result-time electors live in the result schemas.

established_year.description: Year of the Delimitation Order that defined the current boundary (e.g. 2008 for the 2008 Delimitation Commission Order). Optional.

reservation.description: GEN = unreserved. SC = Scheduled Caste. ST = Scheduled Tribe.
